title: Manage a controlled growing environment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage a controlled growing environment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify crop requirements

pcs.text: Determine crop growth and production requirements according to a documented production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine crop growth and production requirements according to a documented production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine crop growth and production requirements according to a documented production plan.

pcs.text: Research environmental parameters and optimal growing conditions for the specific crop, using available information resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research environmental parameters and optimal growing conditions for the specific crop, using available information resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research environmental parameters and optimal growing conditions for the specific crop, using available information resources.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record controlled growing environment factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record controlled growing environment factors.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, cost and confirm availability of structures, machinery, equipment and resources required to control environmental conditions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine management objectives for the controlled growing environment consistent with production plan and market requirements for crop quantity and quality.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a schedule of environmental control procedures according to controlled environment management objectives.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate and report staff training needs for operation and maintenance of environmental control systems.

pcs.text: Negotiate and document a budget supporting the controlled environment management plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Negotiate and document a budget supporting the controlled environment management plan.
